name: Cocoa-Mallow Cookie-Wiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease cookie sheets.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, butter, vanilla, and egg. Mix well.
3. Stir in milk. Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off.
4. Add remaining ingredients; mix until well combined.
5. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls 2 inches apart on prepared cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 7 to 9 minutes or until edges appear set. Allow to cool for 1 minute before removing from sheets.
7. Cool completely.
8. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients and beat until light and fluffy (about 2 minutes).
9. Place two cookies flat together with one tablespoon of filling in the middle, sandwich-style.
10. Store in a tightly covered container.
11. Makes 30 sandwiches.
